notes: HELD at 1.0.0 (2026-06-20): the v1.0.3 OTA re-triggered the OTA-download PANIC crash-loop on a device whose running OTA path is still the v1.0.1-era buggy one (Backtrace CORRUPTED mid-download of rtkdata-fw.bin, even at full ~155K heap). Holding the channel below any deployed FW_VERSION so devices stop attempting the update and boot clean. Do NOT raise this until the OTA-download crash is fixed AND the fixed OTA is on every device (buggy-OTA devices must be USB-reflashed; they cannot self-OTA to the fix).
